subject: Dec 7th, 2025
fact: The session takes place on Dec 7th, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Dec 7th, 2025

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is a familiar sinkhole entrance to the Underdark located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar.
source_quote: The party returned to the familiar sinkhole known as The Waydown, a half-day's journey from Hillsfar that served as their gateway to the Underdark

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Hillsfar is a city the party previously saved from demonic possession.
source_quote: The soldiers recognized them as the heroes who had saved Hillsfar from demonic possession

subject: Red Plumes
fact: The Red Plumes are a contingent of soldiers whose commander returned to the city with a larger force.
source_quote: leaving only these two guards who had no desire to venture into the darkness below

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral is the commander of the Red Plumes who returned to the city with a larger contingent.
source_quote: Their commander, Vuhm Yestral, had returned to the city with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes

subject: Daein
fact: Daein is the only party member without natural darkvision before purchasing goggles.
source_quote: Daein, the only member of the party without natural darkvision

subject: enchanted goggles
fact: Daein purchased a pair of enchanted goggles to see clearly in the Underdark.
source_quote: Daein, the only member of the party without natural darkvision, finally purchased a pair of enchanted goggles that would allow him to see clearly in the perpetual darkness of the Underdark

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits is the destination of the party's two-day journey through the Underdark.
source_quote: began their two-day journey to the Howling Pits

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas provided the accurate directions and map used to guide the party to the Howling Pits.
source_quote: guided by Murssvayas's accurate directions and map

subject: fire giant
fact: Two massive fire giants ambushed the party in a large cave within the Howling Pits.
source_quote: the party was suddenly ambushed by two massive fire giants who leaped from behind stalactites

subject: fire giant
fact: One of the fire giants possessed leathery wings too small for flight.
source_quote: one possessed leathery wings too small for flight

subject: fire giant
fact: One of the fire giants had an extra eye, a sign of madness.
source_quote: while the other had an extra eye, clear signs that they had been affected by the madness plaguing the giants

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur attempted to strike a fire giant with magic, but the attack was ineffective.
source_quote: Felkur attempted to strike one with magic, but the attack proved remarkably ineffective

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned radiant guardians to protect the party and slow the giants' movements.
source_quote: Bramgrim positioned himself strategically and summoned radiant guardians to protect the party, creating an aura that slowed the giants' movements

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was knocked unconscious and bleeding by a critical blow from a fire giant.
source_quote: one of the giants landed a critical blow that sent Bramgrim crashing to the ground, unconscious and bleeding

subject: flight from giants
fact: The party decided to flee the combat after realizing they were outmatched.
source_quote: The party quickly realized they were outmatched and made the difficult decision to flee

subject: Bramgrim unconscious
fact: Bramgrim regained consciousness after the party fled and discussed a new strategy.
source_quote: After Bramgrim regained consciousness, confused and shaken by what had happened

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas wove a spell to mask the party's movements to sneak past the giants.
source_quote: Akritas wove a spell that would mask their movements

subject: yellow mold
fact: The party encountered a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold.
source_quote: the party entered a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold

subject: cloakers
fact: Daein spotted bat-like creatures lurking in the shadows above in a tight passageway.
source_quote: Daein spotted bat-like creatures lurking in the shadows above

subject: cloakers
fact: Akritas identified the bat-like creatures as cloakers, intelligent predators of the Underdark.
source_quote: Akritas identified them as cloakers, mysterious and intelligent predators of the Underdark

subject: underground river
fact: The party reached a wide cave bisected by a swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: They soon reached a wide cave bisected by a swift-flowing underground river

subject: Cave Creepers
fact: Strange gray and white fungi covering the river banks were identified as Cave Creepers.
source_quote: Bramgrim smugly explained that the fungi were Cave Creepers, which would drive anyone mad if touched

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim refused to lead the way through a tight passageway due to the risk of an ambush from above.
source_quote: Bramgrim refused to lead the way, pointing out that it would be an ideal place for an ambush from above

subject: magical gloves
fact: The party crafted magical gloves for the Owlbear to make its attacks more powerful.
source_quote: They enhanced their Owlbear companion with magical gloves that would make its attacks more powerful and effective in combat

subject: Goggles of Night
fact: Daein purchased Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces.
source_quote: Daein purchases Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces

subject: greatsword
fact: The fire giants attacked the party with greatswords.
source_quote: their greatswords cleaving through the air with terrifying power

subject: Felkur's Catapult failure
fact: Felkur rolled a natural one on his Catapult spell against a fire giant, dealing only four points of damage.
source_quote: Felkur rolls a natural one on his Catapult spell against a fire giant, dealing only four points of damage

subject: Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians at fifth level to create a radiant aura affecting the giants.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians at fifth level, creating a radiant aura that affects both giants and halves their speed

subject: Bramgrim's critical hit
fact: A fire giant critically struck Bramgrim with its greatsword, dealing seventy-four points of damage.
source_quote: The second giant critically strikes Bramgrim with its greatsword, dealing seventy-four points of damage and knocking him unconscious

subject: Felkur's stumble
fact: Felkur rolled a natural one on his stealth check, stumbling and stubbing his toe.
source_quote: Most of the party rolls well on stealth, but Felkur rolls a natural one, stumbling and stubbing his toe

subject: Daein's Fly spell
fact: Daein used his mandolin to cast Fly on himself to help the party cross the deep pits.
source_quote: Daein uses his mandolin to cast Fly on himself and then uses his power to transfer everyone across the pits

subject: Bramgrim's recovery
fact: Bramgrim regained forty-one hit points during a short rest.
source_quote: The party takes a short rest, during which Bramgrim regains forty-one hit points

subject: madness plague
fact: The giants show signs of being affected by a madness plaguing their kind.
source_quote: clear signs that they had been affected by the madness plaguing the giants

subject: stealth strategy
fact: The party decided to use stealth to bypass the giants rather than engaging them directly.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggested using stealth to bypass the giants rather than engaging them directly

subject: mandolin
fact: Daein used his mandolin as a spellcasting focus to cast Fly.
source_quote: Daein uses his mandolin to cast Fly on himself

subject: gray fungus
fact: Strange gray fungus covered the banks of the underground river in large patches.
source_quote: Strange gray and white fungi covered the banks in large patches

subject: white fungus
fact: Strange white fungus covered the banks of the underground river in large patches.
source_quote: Strange gray and white fungi covered the banks in large patches

subject: Bramgrim's quote
fact: Bramgrim protested that there would be no dwarf tossing when grabbed to flee.
source_quote: There will be no dwarf tossing!

subject: Bramgrim's smug explanation
fact: Bramgrim smugly explained that he could identify the mushrooms as an Underdark creature.
source_quote: I'm an Underdark creature, and I can tell these mushrooms even if you couldn't

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear attacked a fire giant with its magical claws, landing one hit for eighteen points of damage.
source_quote: The Owlbear attacks the first giant with its magical claws, landing one hit for eighteen points of damage

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used his Protective Field reaction to reduce damage to Bramgrim by four points.
source_quote: Daein uses his Protective Field reaction to reduce the damage to Bramgrim by four points

subject: sinkhole
fact: The Waydown is described as a sinkhole entrance to the Underdark.
source_quote: The party arrives at The Waydown, a sinkhole entrance to the Underdark

subject: wall
fact: A partially built wall surrounds the entrance to The Waydown.
source_quote: they found a partially built wall surrounding the entrance

subject: soldiers
fact: Two nervous soldiers in splint armor guarded the entrance to The Waydown.
source_quote: guarded by two nervous soldiers in splint armor

subject: shields
fact: The two soldiers guarding the wall carried shields.
source_quote: two soldiers in splint armor with shields

subject: longswords
fact: The two soldiers guarding the wall carried longswords.
source_quote: soldiers in splint armor with shields, longswords, and short bows

subject: short bows
fact: The two soldiers guarding the wall carried short bows.
source_quote: soldiers in splint armor with shields, longswords, and short bows

subject: patrol history
fact: The soldiers mentioned that a patrol used to go down once a day to clear the area.
source_quote: The soldiers explain that a patrol used to go down once a day to clear the area of threats

subject: suspicion of uneventful journey
fact: The party found the lack of problems during their journey unusual and suspicious.
source_quote: encountering no problems along the way—an unusual occurrence that made them suspicious

subject: stalactites
fact: The fire giants leaped from behind stalactites to ambush the party.
source_quote: Two Fire Giants leaped from behind stalactites

subject: giants' resting places
fact: The giants returned to their resting places in the cave after the party fled.
source_quote: returning to their resting places in the cave

subject: giants' laughter
fact: The giants laughed mockingly at the party's retreat.
source_quote: The giants laughed mockingly at their retreat

subject: giant's frustration
fact: One giant noticed the disturbance and screamed in frustration, thrusting its sword into the ground.
source_quote: One giant notices the disturbance and screams in frustration, thrusting its sword into the ground

subject: giant lying down
fact: After screaming, the giant lay back down to sleep.
source_quote: before lying back down to sleep

subject: northern passageway
fact: Daein identified a northern passageway as a viable route while scouting ahead.
source_quote: scouts ahead, identifying a northern passageway as a viable route

subject: poisonous spores
fact: The wind threatened to spread poisonous spores from the yellow mold into the air.
source_quote: threatening to spread the poisonous spores into the air

subject: Bramgrim's poison resistance
fact: Bramgrim suffered some effects from the poison despite his natural resistance before overcoming them.
source_quote: but Bramgrim, despite his natural resistance, suffered some effects before ultimately overcoming them

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits are located in the lowest tunnels of the Underdark.
source_quote: lowest tunnels of the Howling Pits

subject: yellow mold
fact: Patches of yellow mold are peppered throughout the tunnel in the Howling Pits.
source_quote: tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold

subject: wind picking up
fact: A sudden wind picks up in the tunnel, threatening to spread poisonous spores.
source_quote: A sudden wind picks up, threatening to spread the poisonous spores of the mold

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas successfully identifies the mold spores as poisonous with a nature check.
source_quote: Akritas successfully identifies the spores as poisonous with a nature check

subject: holding breath
fact: The party decides to hold their breath to pass through the affected area.
source_quote: The party decides to hold their breath and make Constitution saving throws

subject: Daein
fact: Daein successfully resists the poison from the yellow mold spores.
source_quote: Daein, Akritas, and the Owlbear successfully resist the poison

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas successfully resists the poison from the yellow mold spores.
source_quote: Daein, Akritas, and the Owlbear successfully resist the poison

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear successfully resists the poison from the yellow mold spores.
source_quote: Daein, Akritas, and the Owlbear successfully resist the poison

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim fails his initial saving throw against the poison despite being resistant.
source_quote: Bramgrim, despite being resistant to poison, fails his initial save

subject: Bramgrim taking damage
fact: Bramgrim takes eleven points of damage from the poison.
source_quote: takes eleven points of damage

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim makes a second saving throw and succeeds, preventing further effects.
source_quote: Bramgrim makes a second saving throw and succeeds

subject: poison immunity
fact: The party becomes immune to the poisonous fumes in the area after the wind carries the poison away.
source_quote: After the wind carries the poison away, the party becomes immune to the poisonous fumes in that area

subject: Cloaker Tunnel
fact: The Cloaker Tunnel is a narrow passageway that constricts to only five feet wide in places.
source_quote: narrow passageway that constricts to only five feet wide in places

subject: Cloaker Tunnel
fact: The ceiling of the Cloaker Tunnel rises to thirty feet.
source_quote: ceiling rising to thirty feet

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim refuses to lead the party through the narrow passage.
source_quote: Bramgrim refuses to lead the party through the narrow passage

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim points to Daein and suggests he go first.
source_quote: pointing to Daein and suggesting he go first

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim expresses concern that the tight passageway with high ceilings would be an ideal place for an ambush from above.
source_quote: Bramgrim expresses concern that the tight passageway with high ceilings would be an ideal place for an ambush from above

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim suggests that Akritas cast Pass Without Trace again.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggests that Akritas cast Pass Without Trace again

subject: Daein
fact: Daein uses his investigation skills and rolls a twenty-four.
source_quote: Daein uses his investigation skills and rolls a twenty-four

fact: Daein spots bat-like creatures lurking in the tunnel.
source_quote: spotting bat-like creatures lurking in the tunnel

fact: Akritas identifies the creatures as cloakers.

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace.

subject: stealth checks
fact: The entire party rolls high on their stealth checks.

fact: The party successfully sneaks past the cloakers, avoiding a dangerous encounter.
source_quote: The party successfully sneaks past the cloakers, avoiding a dangerous encounter

subject: Elventree
fact: Elventree is a known location where the party begins their journey.
source_quote: A known location where the party begins their journey

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The party begins their expedition at the Silver Shadow Cave in Elventree.
source_quote: specifically at the Silver Shadow Cave

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is a sinkhole located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar.
source_quote: A sinkhole located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown serves as a familiar entrance to the Underdark.
source_quote: serving as a familiar entrance to the Underdark

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is now partially surrounded by a wall.
source_quote: It is now partially surrounded by a wall

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: The Waydown is guarded by soldiers.
source_quote: guarded by soldiers

subject: The Waydown
fact: The sinkhole descends one hundred feet to a swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: The sinkhole descends one hundred feet to a swift-flowing underground river

subject: Underdark
fact: The Underdark is characterized by natural formations, increasing patches of fungus, and perpetual darkness.
source_quote: characterized by natural formations, increasing patches of fungus, and perpetual darkness

subject: travel to Howling Pits
fact: The party travels through rough and less worn tunnels and caves for two days to reach the Howling Pits.
source_quote: travels through rough and less worn tunnels and caves for two days to reach the Howling Pits

subject: Howling Pits
fact: Tunnels in the Howling Pits vary between ten to thirty feet wide and just as tall.
source_quote: tunnels varying between ten to thirty feet wide and just as tall

subject: Howling Pits
fact: A maddening, howling wind is ever-present in the Howling Pits.
source_quote: A maddening, howling wind is ever-present

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The wind in the Howling Pits masks sounds more than seventy-five feet away.
source_quote: masking sounds more than seventy-five feet away

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits contain large caves, treacherous deep pits, an underground river, and various dangerous fungi and creatures.
source_quote: The area contains large caves, treacherous deep pits, an underground river, and various dangerous fungi and creatures

subject: mutated fire giants
fact: The Howling Pits contain mutated fire giants.
source_quote: including mutated fire giants

subject: cloakers
fact: The Howling Pits contain cloakers.
source_quote: including mutated fire giants and cloakers

subject: Fire Giant Cave
fact: The Fire Giant Cave is a large, dark cave within the Howling Pits.
source_quote: A large, dark cave within the Howling Pits

subject: mutated fire giants
fact: Two mutated fire giants ambushed the party in the Fire Giant Cave.
source_quote: where two mutated fire giants ambushed the party

subject: Fire Giant Cave
fact: The giants hide behind stalactites in the Fire Giant Cave.
source_quote: The giants hide behind stalactites

subject: Fire Giant Cave
fact: The cave echoes with deep, hateful howls rising above the gusting wind.
source_quote: cave echoes with deep, hateful howls rising above the gusting wind

subject: Deep Pits Section
fact: The Deep Pits Section is a treacherous section of the Howling Pits littered with dangerously deep pits.
source_quote: A treacherous section of the Howling Pits littered with dangerously deep pits

subject: Deep Pits Section
fact: Relentless winds howl from the deep pits.
source_quote: from which relentless winds howl

subject: flying across deep pits
fact: The party had to fly across the Deep Pits Section to avoid falling.
source_quote: The party had to fly across this area to avoid falling

subject: Underground River Cave
fact: The Underground River Cave is a wide cave in the Howling Pits bisected by a fifteen-foot wide, swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: A wide cave in the Howling Pits, bisected by a fifteen-foot wide, swift-flowing underground river

subject: Cave Creepers
fact: The banks of the Underground River Cave are covered in strange gray and white fungi known as Cave Creepers.
source_quote: Its banks are covered in strange gray and white fungi known as Cave Creepers

subject: Cave Creepers
fact: Cave Creepers can drive people mad if touched.
source_quote: that can drive people mad if touched

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas provided the party with accurate directions and a map for their journey.
source_quote: An individual who provided the party with accurate directions and a map

fact: Murssvayas's directions led the party directly to the Howling Pits without problems.
source_quote: The directions proved reliable, leading the party directly to their destination without problems

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: Two nervous guards in splint armor, shields, longswords, and short bows are stationed at The Waydown.
source_quote: Two nervous guards in splint armor, shields, longswords, and short bows stationed at The Waydown

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: The Red Plume Soldiers recognize the party as the heroes who saved Hillsfar from demonic possession.
source_quote: recognize the party as the heroes who saved Hillsfar from demonic possession

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: The Red Plume Soldiers are relieved the party is not there to cause trouble.
source_quote: and are relieved the party is not there to cause trouble

fact: The Red Plume Soldiers express their reluctance to venture into the Underdark themselves.
source_quote: They express their reluctance to venture into the Underdark themselves

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: The Red Plume Soldiers have never been down into the Underdark.
source_quote: having never been down there

fact: Vuhm Yestral is the commander of the Red Plumes.

fact: Vuhm Yestral previously helped a group of adventurers in the Underdark.

fact: Vuhm Yestral has returned to Hillsfar with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes.

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral left only two soldiers to guard The Waydown.

fact: The Owlbear is the party's animal companion and martial sidekick.

fact: The Owlbear is enhanced with magical gloves that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage.

fact: The Owlbear has improved critical hits on rolls of nineteen or twenty.

fact: The Owlbear has extra attack capabilities.

fact: The Owlbear has an increased proficiency bonus.

fact: The Owlbear participates in combat, attacking fire giants with its magical claws.

fact: Two fire giants encountered in the Howling Pits show clear signs of madness.

fact: One mutated fire giant possesses leathery wings too small for flight.

fact: One mutated fire giant has an extra eye.

fact: Cloakers are mysterious and intelligent bat-like predators of the Underdark.
source_quote: Mysterious and intelligent bat-like predators of the Underdark

fact: Cloakers lurk in narrow tunnels with high ceilings.

fact: Cloakers descend from above to attack their prey.

fact: Cloakers use darkvision to hunt.

fact: The Magical Gloves were crafted for the Owlbear at a cost of one hundred gold pieces.

fact: The gloves make the Owlbear's claw attacks magical.

fact: The gloves provide a plus one bonus to both attack rolls and damage.

subject: Goggles of Night
fact: Daein purchased Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces before descending into the Underdark.

fact: The goggles grant the wearer darkvision.

subject: Goggles of Night
fact: The goggles allow Daein to see clearly in the perpetual darkness of the Underdark.
source_quote: allowing Daein to see clearly in the perpetual darkness of the Underdark

fact: Daein's Mandolin is a magical musical instrument used to cast spells.

fact: The mandolin can grant the Fly spell to a creature.
source_quote: It can grant the Fly spell to a creature

subject: Daein's Mandolin
fact: The mandolin cannot cast the same spell again until the next dawn.

fact: Daein used the mandolin to grant himself flight.

fact: Felkur cast the spell Catapult against one of the mutated fire giants.

fact: Felkur rolled extremely poorly with Catapult and dealt only four points of damage to the giant.

fact: Daein used the Protective Field ability to protect Bramgrim from the fire giant's devastating attacks.

fact: The Protective Field reduces incoming damage by four points.

fact: Bramgrim cast the spell Spirit Guardians at fifth level during the fire giant encounter.

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: Spirit Guardians creates a radiant aura with a fifteen-foot radius around the caster.
source_quote: creates a radiant aura with a fifteen-foot radius around the caster

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: Spirit Guardians harms enemies and halves their movement speed if they fail a Wisdom saving throw.
source_quote: harms enemies and halves their movement speed if they fail a Wisdom saving throw

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim positioned himself strategically to affect both giants with Spirit Guardians before being knocked unconscious.

fact: The party used Pass Without Trace to successfully sneak past the fire giants after their initial defeat.

source_quote: Daein used it on himself to scout ahead and navigate dangerous terrain

fact: The mandolin can only cast the same spell once per day.
